seo_data.generated_keywords: POCO X7 Pro, Dimensity 8400-Ultra, 90W HyperCharge, 6000mAh battery, 1.5K AMOLED display, 50MP OIS camera, IP68, LPDDR5X, UFS 4.0, Xiaomi HyperOS 2, LiquidCool Technology, Dual SIM, 5G, Android 15
seo_data.meta_title: POCO X7 Pro: Flagship Performance with 90W HyperCharge
seo_data.meta_description: Experience the POCO X7 Pro with Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra, 6000mAh battery, 90W HyperCharge, 1.5K AMOLED display, 50MP OIS camera, and IP68 rating.
seo_data.seo_long_description:
The POCO X7 Pro redefines speed and performance, featuring the flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra processor built on TSMC's advanced 4nm process technology. This chipset, with its world-first ARM Cortex-A725 CPU architecture and All-Big-Core design, delivers an impressive AnTuTu score of 1,704,330, ensuring superior gaming and multitasking capabilities. Complemented by LPDDR5X RAM and UFS 4.0 storage, the device offers smooth and reliable operation, further enhanced by Xiaomi HyperOS 2 and WildBoost Optimization 3.0 for an optimized user experience.

The device boasts a stunning 6.67-inch CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display with ultra-slim bezels, providing a premium viewing experience with 12-bit color depth, 3200 nits peak brightness, and Corning Gorilla Glass 7i protection. Photography is handled by a versatile camera system, including a 50MP main camera with OIS for sharp, stable shots and 4K video recording, alongside an 8MP ultrawide and a 20MP front camera. Powering these features is a substantial 6000mAh (typ) battery, supported by 90W HyperCharge technology that can achieve a 100% charge in just 42 minutes, ensuring users stay connected and powered throughout the day.

range_overview:
The POCO X7 Pro is engineered for users demanding flagship-level performance and an exceptional mobile experience. At its core lies the powerful Dimensity 8400-Ultra chipset, manufactured with TSMC's 4nm process, delivering a significant boost in CPU, GPU, and NPU performance and efficiency compared to previous generations. This processing prowess, combined with LPDDR5X RAM and UFS 4.0 storage, ensures ultra-fast app loading, seamless multitasking, and superior gaming, further optimized by Xiaomi HyperOS 2 and the WildBoost Optimization 3.0 system which enhances graphics, connectivity, and audio.

Visuals are brought to life on the 6.67-inch CrystalRes 1.5K AMOLED display, featuring a 120Hz refresh rate and an impressive 3200 nits peak brightness. The display also supports Dolby Vision, HDR10+, and advanced eye care features like 1920Hz PWM dimming, all protected by Corning Gorilla Glass 7i. For sustained peak performance, the device incorporates LiquidCool Technology 4.0 with a 5000mm² ultra-large loop pump and a 3D IceLoop System, efficiently managing heat even during intensive use.

Photography capabilities include a 50MP main camera with Optical Image Stabilization (OIS), capable of capturing detailed photos and smooth 4K videos at various frame rates. Complementing this is an 8MP ultrawide camera and a 20MP front camera, offering a range of creative shooting options and features like Night mode and AI beautify. The POCO X7 Pro also prioritizes durability with an IP68 dust and water resistance rating, safeguarding the device against environmental elements.

Powering this comprehensive package is a robust 6000mAh (typ) battery, providing extended usage. When it's time to recharge, the 90W HyperCharge technology rapidly replenishes the battery, achieving a full charge in approximately 42 minutes with the included 90W in-box charger. Additional features like Dual SIM support, advanced 5G connectivity, Wi-Fi 6, Bluetooth 6.0, in-screen fingerprint sensor, and a comprehensive navigation system complete the premium feature set of the POCO X7 Pro.
sales_arguments: Flagship Dimensity 8400-Ultra processor for unparalleled speed and gaming performance.
Rapid 90W HyperCharge fully charges the 6000mAh (typ) battery in just 42 minutes.
Immersive 6.67" CrystalRes 1.5K 120Hz AMOLED display with 3200 nits peak brightness and Gorilla Glass 7i protection.
Professional-grade 50MP main camera with OIS for stunning photos and 4K video, complemented by a 20MP front camera.
Robust IP68 dust and water resistance ensures strong protection against environmental elements.

technical_specifications.CPU: Octa-core (1x3.25 GHz Cortex-A725 & 3x3.0 GHz Cortex-A725 & 4x2.1 GHz Cortex-A725)
technical_specifications.Display Type: AMOLED, 68B colors, 120Hz, 1920Hz PWM, Dolby Vision, HDR10+
technical_specifications.Rear Camera Features: LED flash, HDR, panorama, Dynamic shots, Motion tracking focus, Motion capture, 50MP mode, Portrait mode, Documents, Night mode, Pro mode
technical_specifications.Front Camera Features: Soft-light ring, AI beautify, Night mode, Portrait mode
technical_specifications.Sensors: Fingerprint (under display, optical), accelerometer, gyro, proximity, compass, 360° Ambient light sensor, Flicker sensor, IR blaster, X-axis linear vibration motor
technical_specifications.Audio: Dual speakers, Dolby Atmos®, Hi-Res Audio, Hi-Res Audio Wireless
technical_specifications.Build: Glass front (Gorilla Glass 7i), plastic back/silicone polymer back
